data.biography:
Tom Vaughan-Lawlor (born 4 November 1977) is an Irish actor. He is best known in Ireland for his roles as Nigel 'Nidge' Delaney in the RTÉ One series Love/Hate (2010–2014) and is known internationally for his role as Ebony Maw in Avengers: Infinity War and its sequel Avengers: Endgame.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Tom Vaughan-Lawlor, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

data.biography: 汤姆·沃恩-劳勒（Tom Vaughan-Lawlor）是爱尔兰电影和电视演员。
data.name: 汤姆·沃恩-劳勒

data.biography: Tom Vaughan-Lawlor é um ator irlandês. Ele é mais conhecido na Irlanda por seus papéis como Nigel 'Nidge' Delaney na série RTÉ One Love/Hate, e é conhecido internacionalmente por seu papel como Ebony Maw em Avengers: Infinity War e sua sequência Avengers: Endgame.
湯姆·沃恩 - 勞勒（Tom Vaughan - Lawlor）是愛爾蘭電影和電視演員。
data.name: 湯姆·沃恩 - 勞勒
